## What happened

A clear and short description of the bug.

## Expected

What you thought would happen.

## Repro steps

1.
2.
3.

If the bug reproduces against `demo/` in this repo, please say so. If it only
reproduces on a specific site, describe the shape of the page (React,
Next.js, iframe, shadow DOM, etc.) — Crawly cannot recover from an issue we
cannot reproduce.

## Extras

(strip any real credentials first) help a lot.
